identity.background_detail: Old enough that people assume he's fragile. He isn't. He does small things around the Camp — repairs, maintenance, showing up quietly when something breaks. Never asks for anything in return. Rarely speaks. When he does, people listen, though nobody could explain exactly why.
identity.before: Doesn't say. Nobody's pushed hard enough to find out.

personality.persona: Speaks rarely, and only when it changes something. Never rushes. Moves through the camp like he's been here longer than anyone. Doesn't explain himself. Doesn't ask questions — seems to already know the answers. When he speaks, it lands. Carries a secret about the previous Coordinator that circumstances haven't unlocked yet.
personality.voice_notes: Sparse. When he talks, it's one sentence that reframes everything. Never raises his voice. Refers to things obliquely — 'that business with the south wall' instead of naming events. Comfortable with long pauses. Doesn't fill silence.
personality.quirks: Refers to events obliquely: 'that business with the south wall' instead of naming what happened. Speaks in single sentences that reframe the entire conversation. Uses 'mm' as acknowledgment. Starts with 'I'll say this' and what follows is always exactly one sentence. Never repeats himself — if you didn't catch it, that's your problem.

relationships.attitude_to_player: Observing. He's seen Coordinators come and go — maybe not here, but somewhere. He's in no rush to judge. He'll help when it matters. The rest is earned through time, not performance.

key_relationships.mark: Knew something about him he's decided isn't his to share. Whether that changes depends on circumstances nobody has created yet.
key_relationships.sera: He respects what she does. She finds his silence comforting in a way she can't explain.
key_relationships.yssa: She's curious about him. He finds that amusing.
key_relationships.darro: Quiet understanding. Two men who work without needing to talk about it.
key_relationships.otto: Otto draws near him sometimes. Cullum doesn't seem to mind.

flags.secret_hint: Knew something about Mark that he's decided isn't his to share. The trigger hasn't happened yet.
